description: Style NoteCreated for the woman of sophistication, this sandal from catwalk is crafted with high quality synthetic leather to offer unparalleled comfort and is uniquely designed to give your feet that urban touch.Product DetailsSynthetic leather thong style strap with a velcro closure, elasticated midfoot strap and an ankle strap with a velcro closureA toe separatorSmooth footbedTPU outsole with circular grooves and an upraised heel Material and CareSyntheticWipe surface with a clean, dry clothDo not store in direct sunlight
